message:
Add unit tests for assignment filtering (bd-258jg)

Tests filterAssignments function with coverage for:
- Status filtering (working, failed, completed, assigned, reassigned)
- Agent type filtering (claude, codex, gemini)
- Pane number filtering
- Combined filter criteria
- Edge cases (empty input, invalid filters, nil handling)
- Summary stats calculation (counts by status/agent, completion rate)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
